prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含理科）最低位次分别为 13092→17849→11834→28501→19311，波动剧烈；2024 年因专业组结构调整出现异常高值（28501），2025 年大幅回弹至 19311，近两年整体呈后移趋势，2025 年基准约 19311 名；该校在广西物理类（理科）招生计划 2021–2022 年各 83 人，2023 年 87 人，2024 年 80 人，2025 年 84 人；2026 年计划 82 人，较 2025 年减少 2 人，小幅缩招约 2.4%，理论上使竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年约第 73 名，近年排名稳定在 60–73 区间，属全国中上游理工类高校；该校在近年声誉舆情监测中未出现明显负面或投档异常信号；抖音综合热度排名未进入前 100，关注度一般，报考心理无明显扰动；该校以石油石化特色著称，化学工程与技术、地质资源与地质工程等为传统优势领 域。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业持续高热推荐，与该校工科定位契合，对考生吸引力较强；广西 2026 年普通高考总人数约 39.2 万，较 2025 年（约 38 万）增加约 1.2 万，按近年物理类占比约 68% 估算，物理类考生约 26.9 万，较 2025 年增加约 8600 人，竞争加剧；省控线（本科批）2024 年 371 分、2025 年 370 分，基本稳定；该校位于山东青岛，非本省高校，在广西无特殊地域偏好；近年广西招生计划维持在 80–87 人区间，占比稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅回弹后的高位基准（19311）、2026 年小幅缩招（-2 人）以及广西物理类考生增加约 8600 人，供需两端均指向竞争略加剧方向，再结合考生规模扩大因素做有限修正，预计 2026 年最低位次约 19085 名，区间 18585–19585 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were 13092→17849→11834→28501→19311, with significant fluctuations; in 2024, due to adjustments in major group structure, an abnormally high value (28501) appeared, rebounding sharply to 19311 in 2025, showing an overall backward trend in recent two years, with a baseline around 19311 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan in Guangxi for Physics Category (Science) was 83 in 2021–2022, 87 in 2023, 80 in 2024, 84 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 82, a decrease of 2 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 2.4%, theoretically intensifying competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 73rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 60–73 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of science and engineering universities nationwide; no significant negative or abnormal admission signals have been detected in recent reputation monitoring; the comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is not in the top 100, with general attention, and no obvious psychological disturbance in application behavior; the university is renowned for its petroleum and petrochemical characteristics, with chemical engineering and technology, geological resources and geological engineering as traditional advantageous fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, aligning with the university's engineering orientation and strongly attracting candidates; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Guangxi general college entrance examination is about 392,000, an increase of about 12,000 from 2025 (about 380,000); based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 68%, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 269,000, an increase of about 8,600 from 2025, intensifying competition; the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) was 371 in 2024 and 370 in 2025, basically stable; the university is located in Qingdao, Shandong, not a local university, with no special regional preference in Guangxi; the enrollment plan in Guangxi has remained in the 80–87 range in recent years, with a stable proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the high baseline after the sharp rebound in 2025 (19311), the slight reduction in enrollment in 2026 (-2), and the increase of about 8,600 Physics Category candidates in Guangxi, both supply and demand indicate slightly intensified competition; with limited correction for the increase in candidate scale, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 19085, with a range of 18585–19585.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2023, the minimum rank for liberal arts was 2396; in 2024, for history category it was 2980; in 2025, for history category it was 2387. The fluctuation range over the past three years is about 600 places, and in 2025 it rebounded to 2387, roughly the same as 2023. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Guangxi was 2 students in 2023, 5 students each in 2024–2025, and 9 students in 2026, an increase of 4 students compared to 2025, a significant expansion of 80%, theoretically weakening competition noticeably.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 73rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the upper-middle tier of science and engineering universities nationwide, with a very small liberal arts enrollment scale. The university's reputation and public opinion have been stable in recent years, with no significant negative incidents. Its popularity on Douyin is average, with no notable disturbance in application psychology. The university is strong in science and engineering, while liberal arts majors are not its advantageous fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of liberal arts majors such as law and Chinese language and literature is divided and wait-and-see, while accounting still has some popularity due to its advantage in civil service exams. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the ordinary college entrance examination in Guangxi is about 392,000. Based on the recent history category proportion of about 32%, the number of history category candidates is estimated to be about 125,000, an increase of about 6,000 compared to 2025 (about 119,000), slightly intensifying competition. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) was 400 points in 2024 and 402 points in 2025, basically stable. The university is located in Qingdao, Shandong, not a local university in Guangxi, and its liberal arts enrollment in Guangxi is very small (2–9 students in recent years), with no significant regional preference influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: In 2026, the history category enrollment plan expands from 5 to 9 students (+80%), significantly reducing admission difficulty. However, the increase of about 6,000 history category candidates in Guangxi offsets this, and with limited correction due to the expansion of the candidate pool, the predicted minimum rank for 2026 is about 3233, with a range of 2733–3733.
